purpose: Prompt and delivery manifest for Tavern system sound effects generated in ComfyUI.

comfy.preferredWorkflow: Stable Audio 3 Medium Base or Stable Audio 3 Small-SFX

promptDefaults.negativePrompt: speech, human voice, spoken words, vocals, melody, long music loop, harsh alarm, distortion, clipping, hiss, noisy reverb tail, horror sting, cartoon boing, recognizable franchise sound
promptDefaults.styleAnchor: short premium app UI sound for a cozy tabletop tavern voice chat, warm wood and soft brass texture, clean transient, gentle tail, non-distracting, game-ready

sounds.name: vc-self-join
sounds.trigger: The local user enters a voice room.
sounds.prompt: You pull up a chair at a cozy tabletop tavern: soft upward wooden chair slide, tiny warm brass shimmer, confident but quiet confirmation. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: vc-self-leave
sounds.trigger: The local user leaves a voice room.
sounds.prompt: You step away from a cozy tabletop tavern table: gentle downward wooden chair tuck, soft air hush, calm closing gesture. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: voice-join
sounds.trigger: Another member enters the voice room.
sounds.prompt: Another member quietly joins the tavern table: light chair contact, short upward glassy chime, friendly presence cue, very subtle. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: voice-leave
sounds.trigger: Another member leaves the voice room.
sounds.prompt: Another member quietly leaves the tavern table: soft chair slide away, short downward chime, polite and unobtrusive. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: mic-toggle
sounds.trigger: The local user toggles microphone mute.
sounds.prompt: Tiny tactile microphone toggle for a tabletop tavern app: muted wooden switch click with a soft felt stop, crisp and dry. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: screenshare-start
sounds.trigger: The local user starts screen sharing.
sounds.prompt: A magical tabletop map projector turns on: soft relay click, faint arcane shimmer rising, clean bright start cue, not loud. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: screenshare-stop
sounds.trigger: The local user stops screen sharing.
sounds.prompt: A magical tabletop map projector powers down: gentle relay click, shimmer fades downward, calm stop cue, short tail. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: message
sounds.trigger: A regular chat message should chime.
sounds.prompt: Small cozy tavern message chime: one soft wooden tap with a tiny warm bell overtone, readable but low attention. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: mention
sounds.prompt: Important mention chime for a tavern app: two gentle brass-and-glass notes, brighter than a message but not alarming, clear priority cue. No speech.

sounds.name: dm
sounds.prompt: Private message cue for a cozy tavern app: quick two-tap wooden knock with a warm low bell, personal and discreet. No speech. No melody.

sounds.name: roll
sounds.trigger: The local user's dice roll resolves.
sounds.prompt: Dice result confirmation: three tiny dice clacks on a wooden table followed by a soft bright bell, playful tabletop feel, clean and short. No speech.
